content: On-device personalization/edge inference core value props: latency (no server round-trip), privacy (raw data never leaves device), works offline, lower cost. Typical pattern is lightweight pre-trained model (quantized/pruned) doing local inference, with periodic optional cloud sync of aggregated/anonymized signal (not raw data) to improve the global model over time -- directly analogous to Heed's local-inference + session-end weight-push design.
